product_overview: Spare Parts ERP is a desktop inventory and business management application for spare parts operations, covering authentication, inventory, sales, purchasing, parties, expenses, accounting, and settings. The browser-based preview supports testing of UI flows and client-side logic through mocked application services.
core_goals: Provide secure user access and session handling
Enable day-to-day inventory, sales, and purchasing operations
Track customers, suppliers, expenses, cashbox activity, and financial reports
Support configurable system settings, including printer and user preferences
Allow reliable browser-based E2E and integration validation through preview-mode flows

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Allows users to access the application through login, PIN verification, and session checks.
user_flows: GET /login to open the login screen -> Enter valid admin credentials in the login form -> Receive authenticated session state and access to protected pages -> GET /dashboard with authenticated session -> Receive 200 with dashboard HTML

GET /login to open the login screen -> Submit invalid credentials in the login form -> Receive authentication error state and remain on /login -> Attempt to access GET /dashboard without a valid session -> Receive authorization failure or redirect to login

features.name: Dashboard & Summary
features.description: Displays quick stats, inventory alerts, and recent transactions for authenticated users.
user_flows: GET /dashboard with a valid authenticated session -> Receive 200 with dashboard HTML and summary widgets -> View quick stats, low-stock alerts, and recent transactions
GET /dashboard without an authenticated session -> Receive redirect or access denied response -> User is not allowed to view summary data

features.name: Inventory Management
features.description: Lets users view inventory, inspect low-stock items, and work with barcodes and parts records.
user_flows: GET /inventory with a valid authenticated session -> Receive 200 with the main inventory table -> Review parts, stock levels, and barcode-related information -> GET /low-stock with the same session -> Receive 200 with low-stock items

GET /inventory without a valid authenticated session -> Receive redirect or access denied response -> User cannot view inventory records -> GET /low-stock without a valid session -> Receive authorization failure or redirect to login

features.name: POS & Sales
features.description: Provides point-of-sale checkout and sales history views for creating and reviewing invoices.
user_flows: GET /pos with a valid authenticated session -> Receive 200 with the POS checkout screen -> Select or create a customer in the POS workflow -> Add products to cart, apply discount/tax, and confirm payment -> GET /sales with the same session -> Receive 200 with sales history table

GET /pos without an authenticated session -> Receive redirect or access denied response -> User cannot access checkout -> GET /sales without a valid session -> Receive authorization failure or redirect to login

features.name: Purchase Operations
features.description: Supports supplier purchasing workflows and purchase invoice entry.
user_flows: GET /purchases with a valid authenticated session -> Receive 200 with the purchases ledger -> Open GET /purchases/new to start a new purchase invoice -> Enter supplier and item details, then confirm the invoice in the purchase workflow

GET /purchases/new without an authenticated session -> Receive redirect or access denied response -> User cannot create a purchase invoice -> GET /purchases without a valid session -> Receive authorization failure or redirect to login

features.name: Customer & Supplier Directory
features.description: Maintains customer and supplier lists along with ledger statement views.
user_flows: GET /customers with a valid authenticated session -> Receive 200 with customer list and statements -> Review customer balances and ledger activity -> GET /suppliers with the same session -> Receive 200 with supplier list and statements

GET /customers without an authenticated session -> Receive redirect or access denied response -> User cannot view customer statements -> GET /suppliers without a valid session -> Receive authorization failure or redirect to login

features.name: Expenses & Cashbox
features.description: Records operational expenses and supports cash balance management.
user_flows: GET /expenses with a valid authenticated session -> Receive 200 with the expenses tracking interface -> Create or review an expense entry in the cashbox workflow -> Verify the updated cash balance in the interface

GET /expenses without an authenticated session -> Receive redirect or access denied response -> User cannot access expense tracking -> Attempt to record an expense while unauthenticated -> Receive authorization failure or redirect to login

features.name: Accounting Reports
features.description: Provides access to balance sheet and income statement reporting.
user_flows: GET /accounting with a valid authenticated session -> Receive 200 with balance sheet and financial statement views -> Review income statement and summary totals
GET /accounting without an authenticated session -> Receive redirect or access denied response -> User cannot access accounting reports -> Protected financial data remains unavailable

features.name: Settings Manager
features.description: Allows administrators to manage global settings, users, and printer preferences.
user_flows: GET /settings with a valid authenticated session -> Receive 200 with the settings panel -> Update application preferences, user settings, or printer options in the UI

GET /settings without an authenticated session -> Receive redirect or access denied response -> User cannot access settings management -> Attempt to change settings while unauthenticated -> Receive authorization failure or redirect to login
